title: Brand tax
effect: Brand requirements increase by 1 on every Order and Milestone until the next Chaos Monkey event.

title: Ops breakthrough
effect: Operations requirements decrease by 1 on every Order and Milestone until the next Chaos Monkey event.

title: Talent shuffle
effect: Every founder with Agency or Staff cards must choose one to discard.

title: New priorities
effect: Replace all five open Orders and Milestones.

title: Hiring rebate
effect: Drafting from the Talent Market earns $1 until the next Chaos Monkey event.
